use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATMENT WITH ONCE-DAILY DOSES OF 625MG/5ML
TREATMENT OF ANOREXIA, CACHEXIA, OR AN UNEXPLAINED, SIGNIFICANT WEIGHT LOSS IN PATIENTS WITH A DIAGNOSIS OF ACQUIRED IMMUNODEFICIENCY SYNDROME (AIDS)

indications.text:
Megace® ES oral suspension is indicated for the treatment of anorexia, cachexia, or an unexplained
significant weight loss in patients with a diagnosis of acquired immunodeficiency syndrome
(AIDS).
1.1 Limitations of Use
Other Treatable Causes

Megace ES is indicated for the treatment of anorexia, cachexia, or an unexplained significant
weight loss in patients with a diagnosis of acquired immunodeficiency syndrome (AIDS).
Limitations of Use
Therapy with Megace ES for weight loss should only be instituted after treatable causes of
weight lo...

Megace® ES (megestrol acetate) oral suspension is indicated for the treatment of anorexia,
cachexia, or an unexplained, significant weight loss in patients with a diagnosis of acquired
immunodeficiency syndrome (AIDS).
